title: A connection device and a frame provided with such a device
abstract: A connection device for a frame, the connection device comprising a body comprising:a first engagement member (1) and a second engagement member (2). Said body comprises a sealing flange (13) which is configured to extend in parallel alignment with a first flange (7) of a first beam (4) and with a second flange of a second beam when the first and second beams are connected to the connection device via the first and second engagement members (1, 2) respectively, and which sealing flange (13) comprises a first recess (14) configured for receiving the first flange (7) of the of first beam (4) when the first beam (4) is connected to the connection device via the first engagement member (1), and a second recess (15) configured for receiving the second flange of the second beam when the second beam is connected to the connection device via the second engagement member (2).
claims: Claims 1. A connection device for a frame, the connection device comprising a body comprising: - a first engagement member (1) configured to engage an end portion of a first beam (4) extending in a first direction when the first beam (4) is connected to the connection device via the first engagement member (1), - a second engagement member (2) configured to engage an end portion of a second beam (5) extending in a second direction generally perpendicular to said first direction when the second beam (5) is connected to the connection device via the second engagement member (2), -wherein the first beam (4) comprises a first flange (7) and the second beam (5) comprises a second flange (8) and wherein said first and second flanges (7, 8) are configured to extend in parallel alignment with each other on a first side of the first and second flanges (7, 8) when the first beam (4) is connected to the second beam (5) via the first and second engagement members of the connection device, - said connection device being characterised in that said body comprises a sealing flange (13) which is configured to extend in parallel alignment with the first flange (7) of the first beam (4) and with the second flange (8) of the second beam (5) on said first side of the first flange (7) and the second flange (8) when the first and second beams (4, 5) are connected to the connection device via the first and second engagement members (1, 2) respectively, and which sealing flange (13) comprises a first recess (14) configured for receiving the first flange (7) of the of first beam (4) when the first beam (4) is connected to the connection device via the first engagement member (1), and a second recess (15) configured for receiving the second flange (8) of the second beam (5) when the second beam (5) is connected to the connection device via the second engagement member (2). 2. A connection device according to claim 1, characterised in that the sealing flange (13) has a surface that is in planar alignment with the first and second flanges (7, 8) on said first side of the first and second flanges (7, 8) when the first and second beams (4, 5) are connected to the connection device via the first and second engagement member (1, 2) respectively. 3. A connection device according to claim 1 or 2, characterised in that the first recess (14) has a depth corresponding to the thickness of the first flange (7), and the second recess (15) has a depth corresponding to the thickness of the second flange (8). 4. A connection device according to any one of claims 1-3, characterised in that it comprises - a third engagement member (3) configured to engage an end portion of a third beam (6) extending in a third direction generally perpendicular to said first direction and to said second direction when the third beam (6) is in connected to the connection device via the third engagement member (3), and that the third beam (6) comprises a third flange (9) and the second beam (5) comprises a fourth flange (10), and the third and fourth flanges (9, 10) are configured to extend in parallel alignment with each other on a first side of the third and fourth flanges (9, 10) when the third beam (6) is connected to the second beam (5) via the third and second engagement members of the connection device, and that said body comprises a second sealing flange (16) which is configured to extend in parallel alignment with the third flange (9) of the third beam (6) and with the fourth flange (10) of the second beam (5) on said first side of the third flange (9) and the fourth flange (10) when the third and second beams are connected to the connection device via the third and second engagement member (2) respectively, and which second sealing flange (16) comprises a third recess (17) configured for receiving the third flange (9) of the of third beam (6) when the third beam (6) is connected to the connection device via the third engagement member (3), and a fourth recess (18) configured for receiving the fourth flange (10) of the second beam (5) when the second beam (5) is connected to the connection device via the second engagement member (2). 5. A connection device according to claim 4, characterised in that the second sealing flange (16) has a surface that is in planar alignment with the third and fourth flanges (9, 10) on said first side of the third and fourth flanges (9, 10) when the third and second beams (6, 5) are connected to the connection device via the third and second engagement member (3, 2) respectively. 6. A connection device according to claim 4 or 5, characterised in that the third recess (17) has a depth corresponding to the thickness of the third flange (9), and the fourth recess (18) has a thickness corresponding to the thickness of the fourth flange (10). 7. A frame, comprising a first beam (4), a second beam (5) and a connection device according to any one of claims 1-5, characterised in that the first and second beams (4, 5) are connected to each other via the connection device, wherein the first beam (4) is in engagement with the first engagement member (1) and the second beam (5) is in engagement with the second engagement member (2). 8. A frame according to claim 7, characterised in that said first side of the first flange (7) and of the second flange (8) extends in a plane parallel with the longitudinal axis of the first beam (4) and to the longitudinal axis of the second beam (5). 9. A frame according to claim 8, characterised in that it forms part of a box arrangement that comprises a wall element, a window or a door which extends in plane parallel with the longitudinal axis of the first beam (4) and to the longitudinal axis of the second beam (5) and which bears on a surface formed by said first flange (7), second flange (8) and first sealing flange on said first side of the first flange (7) and the second flange (8). 10. A frame according to claim 8 or 9, characterised in that the connection device comprises a third engagement member (3) configured to engage an end portion of a third beam (6) extending in a third direction generally perpendicular to said first direction and to said second direction when the third beam (6) is in connected to the connection device via the third engagement member (3), and that the frame comprises a third beam (6), which is connected to the third engagement member (3). 11. A frame according to claim 10, characterised in that said first side of the third flange (9) and of the fourth flange (10) extends in a plane parallel with the longitudinal axis of the third beam (6) and to the longitudinal axis of the second beam (5). 12. A frame according to claim 11, characterised in that it forms part of a box arrangement that comprises a wall element, a window or a door which extends in plane parallel with the longitudinal axis of the third beam (6) and to the longitudinal axis of the second beam (5) and which bears on a surface formed by said third flange (9), fourth flange (10) and second sealing flange (16) on said first side of the third flange (9) and the fourth flange (10). 13. A frame according to any one of claims 7-12, characterised in that the first beam (4) has an opening in the end thereof connected to the connection device, and that the first engagement member (1) projects into said opening of the first beam (4), the second beam (5) has an opening in the end thereof connected to the connection device, and that the second engagement member (2) projects into said opening of the second beam (5). 14. A frame according to any one of claims 11-13, characterised in that the third beam (6) has an opening in the end thereof connected to the connection device, and that the third engagement member (3) projects into said opening of the third beam (6).
